name: Rufus Albarea
description:
C is one of the three protagonists in Trails into Reverie. C is introduced as a black-clad knight hiding his true identity through the use of a full-face black mask and accompanying black hood. His true identity is Rufus Albarea.

___________________________________________________________________

Creator's Note: The reason why I used C in his character bio is because his alias was the one that was mainly used during the first half of the events in Trails of Reverie. While he won't be one of the main protagonists in Farewell O' Zemuria, the name in the bio will remain the same until such it is confirmed that Rufus will be the name used on the last sequel of the game.
creator: iBrynhildr
